title: Silhouette of God
overview: Everybody just wants to lead a good life. Take Karm, a young farmer who foolishly believes in communion with spirits. He doesn't know he's being used to swindle people out of their money. When Karm falls in love, he soon realizes everything he has done was wrong in this Thai horror classic.
